$comment: Old WordPress URLs worth preserving. Single source of truth: scripts/gen-redirects.mjs writes public/.htaccess from this file on every build. A trailing '*' is a wildcard whose capture is substituted into the target's '*'. AATUJA URLs are deliberately absent -- that content was deleted, so those paths return the 404 page.

redirects.why: internal slug of the old front page
the 10 official PDFs kept their filenames, so old direct links still resolve
